历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7435 → 6756 → 7897 → 10843 → 10157, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2300 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 10157; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 41 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 53 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 60, an increase of 7 (+13.2%) compared to 2025, with a relatively large expansion, intensifying competition.
3. [School Level] 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 ranked 54th (2025 ranked 48th), stable around 50th, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions.

学校层次与声誉.text: The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average evaluation), with low attention on short video platforms, no obvious sign of application boom; Materials Science and Engineering A, Transportation Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, highly corresponding to the school's enrollment majors (Materials, Transportation, Mechanical, etc.), attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and other majors continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the school's advantageous engineering directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province General College Entrance Examination is 167,000, estimated to decrease by about 3% compared to the 2025 Physics Category candidates of approximately 117,407, slightly easing competition; 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 13.2% intensifying competition, a slight decrease in total candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will be approximately 10912, with a range of 10412–11412.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10412), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1467 → 1391 → 1618 → 2101 → 2045. In recent years, the ranking has generally shifted backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 650 positions over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2045. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 8 students in 2020 and 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 16 in 2025, showing an expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 17 students, an increase of 1 student (+6.25%) compared to 2025, indicating a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it ranks 54th, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts enrollment. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 98th (average evaluation), with no obvious application boom. The university is primarily engineering-oriented, with no A-class disciplines supporting liberal arts majors. However, the Business Administration category (corresponding to the Business Administration discipline not listed in the university's A-class) still has some appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese are relatively popular and recommended. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 53,106 (estimated by proportion), a slight decrease from 54,707 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of ranking backward shift, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan by 6.25% leading to slightly intensified competition, and a small decrease in the total number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2102, with a range of 1724–2480.
